backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a fashion e-commerce backend with product CRUD (admin-only) and user profile management, using role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the ProductBrowse page loading fix (useImageLoader hook, LoadingTimeout, retry logic) to its relevant file and test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components, hooks, and pages.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and UI element tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with the page title 'Fashion Forum' and a root div that mounts the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for product browsing, product detail, and admin pages, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetup modal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Simple full-page component displayed when a non-admin user attempts to access a restricted page, showing a shield icon and a link back to the product listing.
frontend/src/components/AttackOnTitanGal: Swipeable two-image gallery component for Attack on Titan T-shirt product images, using useImageLoader for per-image loading states and useSwipeGesture for touch/mouse navigation.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Renders a row of pill-shaped buttons for filtering products by category, highlighting the currently selected category.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Displays a clickable category thumbnail that expands to reveal a grid of product images, with lazy loading, skeleton placeholders, and error states for each image.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation, Internet Identity login/logout, admin link, and a footer with copyright info.
frontend/src/components/LoadingTimeout.t: Loading indicator component that shows a spinner during loading and switches to a timeout alert with an optional retry button after a configurable delay.
frontend/src/components/MeeshoProductSec: Renders a clickable product image linking to a Meesho affiliate URL, with a loading spinner and hover overlay effect.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product as a card with a lazy-loaded image, Pinterest pin badge, category badge, name, and price, linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Reusable form component for creating or editing a product, with validated fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, and optional Pinterest pin ID.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves it via the user profile mutation before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/SwipeableGallery: A swipeable image gallery component supporting touch and mouse drag navigation, with loading/error states per image and navigation arrows, dots, and a Meesho external link.
frontend/src/components/WatchProductSect: Displays a carousel of ABREXO watch product images with lazy loading and a Meesho affiliate link button using a lookout icon.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageLoader.ts: Custom hook that manages image loading state with retry logic and fallback support, returning the current image source, loading state, error state, and a manual retry function.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products and user profile/admin queries against the ICP backend actor, with toast notifications on mutation results.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: Custom hook that tracks touch and mouse drag events to detect left/right swipe gestures beyond a configurable threshold, returning event handler callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm neutral fashion e-commerce color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin-only page for managing fashion products, providing a table view with add, edit, and delete functionality using dialogs and alert dialogs, with access control via an admin check hook.
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page featuring a hero banner, category filtering, product grid, and several specialized sections (swipeable gallery, watch products, Meesho promotions, Attack on Titan gallery) with external Meesho affiliate links.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page that displays a single product's image, name, price, description, category badge, and an optional Pinterest pin link, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends the theme with Inter/Playfair Display fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and accordion animations, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and state for a fix request targeting image loading issues on the ProductBrowse page, including hanging spinners and timeout states. Records one existing feature fix related to LoadingTimeout, useImageLoader hook, and lazy-loading mechanisms.
